raw.summary: No SAST issues reported. The code addresses all security requirements: cookies have HttpOnly flag (plus Secure and SameSite), password is stored as SHA-256 hash, XSS is mitigated via replace-based escaping, CSRF token is generated per session and verified, admin-only access is enforced, and the exec() call has been removed (scripts are written but not executed). Session signing is still missing (cookies are not signed), but given the constraints and no SAST findings, the overall security posture is acceptable.
